courses.course_name_th: เคมีพื้นฐาน 1
courses.description: Substances; classification of substances; nomenclature of ionic and covalent compounds; scientific measurement; atomic structure; quantum numbers; electron configuration; periodic table; chemical bonding; representative elements; transition elements; stoichiometry; gas; solid; liquid; solution.

courses.course_name_en: Organic Chemistry for Health and Beauty Science I
courses.description: Structure; physical and chemical properties; functional group of organic compounds; introduction to stereochemistry for use in health and beauty sciences; preparation and reaction mechanisms of hydrocarbon compounds; alkenes; alkenes; alkynes; aromatic compounds; alkyl halides; alcohols; phenols; ethers and epoxides; application of organic substances in health and beauty science.

courses.course_name_en: Mass Balance for Health and Beauty Process
courses.description: OBE 2 Basic calculation in industrial process; unit conversion, interpolation, linear regression, graphical and mathematical methods; chemical process parameters, mass balance with and without chemical reaction; gas-liquid and liquid-liquid equilibrium; mass transfer; solving material balance problem equation.

courses.description: Spectroscopy technique; UV-Visible spectroscopy; fluorescence spectroscopy; atomic absorption spectroscopy; infrared spectroscopy; nuclear magnetic resonance spectroscopy; refractometry; polarimetry; principles of chromatography; high performance liquid chromatography; gas chromatography; mass spectrometry; method selection; method validation; sample preparation; certificate of analysis.

courses.description: Overview of atomic structure and properties; periodic table trends and relationship of some properties of the elements; aspects of chemical bonding; reactivity of some inorganic molecules and material; transition metal chemistry; coordination chemistry; coloring of cosmetics, food, and drug; pigment and pigment process; applications of inorganic chemistry in health and beauty product.

source.source_file: สุขภาพและความงาม2567.pdf

Health and Beauty Product for Hair Nail and Color Cosmetics

courses.description: Type of reactor and equipment used in cosmetic industry; mixing; vessel and impeller type; multiphase system; emulsification process; dry system; ball mill; powder grind; extraction technology; solvent extraction; steam extraction; microwave assisted extraction; ultrasonic assisted extraction; supercritical fluid extraction.

courses.description: Introduction to information and publications; search engine and reference management; artificial intelligence searching; research process; research proposal writing; statistical analysis of experimental data; research procedure; Introduction to experimental design; presentation of technical data; technical report writing; scientific presentation; journal article writing.

courses.description: Definition of natural products; binomial nomenclature; primary metabolites and secondary metabolites; biosynthetic classification of natural products; prediction of chemical and physical properties of natural products from chemical structures; separation; extraction and identification techniques; biological activity; quality control and standards for natural product raw materials; trends in the application of natural products in health and beauty industry.

courses.description: Limit and continuity of functions; slope and tangent line; derivative of function; velocity and rate of change; differentiation rules; higher-order derivative; derivatives of elementary functions; parametric equations; applications of derivative; related rates; maxima and minima; indeterminate forms; definite and indefinite integrals; area between curves; techniques of integration; numerical integration.

courses.course_name_th: ฟิสิกส์ทั่วไป
courses.description: OBE 2 Vector; mechanics of motion; Newton’ s law of motion and its application; work; energy; momentum; rotation; vibration; wave; sound; Doppler effect; heat; laws of thermodynamics; fluid mechanics; electric forces; electric fields; electric potential; electric potential energy; electric circuit; magnetic forces; magnetic fields; induction; electromagnetic waves; geometrical optics; modern physics.

courses.course_name_th: ชีววิทยาในชีวิตประจําวัน
courses.description: Definition of biology; characteristic of life; human body; genetics in daily life; man and microorganisms; importance and application of biology in daily life.

courses.course_name_th: สถิติในชีวิตประจําวัน
courses.description: Overview statistics in everyday life; counting technique; probability; sampling technique; index number; statistical quality control; decision analysis; simple linear regression analysis and correlation; time series analysis, decomposition method.

source.source_file: สุขภาพและความงาม2567.pdf

courses.course_name_th: ระบบคอมพิวเตอร์และโปรแกรมประยุกต์
courses.description: OBE 2 Computer system; computer-based problem solving; computer applications as a problem- solving tool; computer technology in document processing and data processing; accessing to network systems and efficient electronic communications.

source.source_file: สุขภาพและความงาม2567.pdf

courses.course_name_th: จริยธรรมในการใช้งานคอมพิวเตอร์
courses.description: Computer crime overiew; types of computer crime; types of intellectual properties; intellectual property relevant to network and computer security; digital rights management; privacy law and regulation; organizational response; protecting programs and data; rights of employees and employers; ownership of products; computer usage privacy; ethics and moral principle; difference between law and ethics.

source.source_file: สุขภาพและความงาม2567.pdf

courses.course_name_th: มนุษย์กับวิทยาศาสตร์กายภาพชีวภาพ
courses.course_name_en: Man Physical Science and Biological Science
courses.description: Physical factors important to human : temperature; moisture; wind; light; pressure; relationships between physical and biological science to human; living organisms; evolution; heredity; infection; immunity; drugs for disease treatment; nutrition; environment changes; global and regional climate; pollution and environmental health; impact of science and technology development to human balance.

courses.course_name_th: ภาษาอังกฤษ 1
courses.description: Listening; speaking; reading and writing skills; communicating in simple and routine tasks; reading short passages; writing sentences.

courses.course_name_th: ภาษาอังกฤษเพื่อการทํางาน
courses.description: Language skills for work; job applications; job interviews; welcoming visitors; telephoning; making appointments; describing company products and services; running meetings; negotiations; performance reviews; business travel.

courses.course_name_th: การสนทนาภาษาอังกฤษ
courses.description: English communication skills with an emphasis on speaking; listening; and pronunciation; functional languages in daily conversation.

courses.course_name_th: เศรษฐศาสตร์ในชีวิตประจําวัน
courses.description: Economic activities in society; consumption; investment; inflation; deflation; financial institutions; taxation; international trade between ASEAN countries; Principle of Sufficient Economy; government direction in economic problem solving; self-adaptation to various economic situations.

source.source_file: สุขภาพและความงาม2567.pdf

courses.course_name_th: เศรษฐศาสตร์เพื่อการพัฒนาชีวิต
courses.description: Human in economic society; fundamental economics for living; trade-off and alternative analysis; market structure; market mechanism and its affecting factors; time value of money; income-expenditure management; savings; investment; economic evaluation of investment and application of knowledge for life development in accordance with Sufficiency Economy Philosophy.

courses.course_name_th: ธุรกิจในชีวิตประจําวัน
courses.description: Importance of business in everyday life; business environment; forms of business; business roles; business information technology management; business ethics and social responsibility.

courses.course_name_th: การพูดเพื่อประสิทธิผล
courses.description: Fundamentals of speech communication and speech development; principles of written dialogue; personality and professional appearance; speaking in various forms and situations; sudden speech training; effective presentation; interview skills for entering a career and applied communication arts by focusing on training to be able to put into practice.

courses.description: History of basketball; techniques; rules; regulations; usage of proper equipment; practice in basic skills and applying the skills to play games; good sportsmanship and spectator.
